title: September 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 13''' is the 256th day of the year (257th in leap years). There are 109 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Gregory Baldwin]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Colin Trevorrow]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 6|''Star Wars'' (1977) 6]] published. The cover date is December.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 32|''Star Wars Weekly'' 32]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 78|''Star Wars'' 78]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[The Crystal Cloak]]" and "[[The Wish Plant]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*2001 – ''[[The Fall of Cloud City]]'' published at [[Wizards.com]].
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 62|''Star Wars Insider'' 62]] released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II Second Edition]]'' released.
*2006 – [[Legacy (2006) 3|''Legacy'' (2006) 3]] published.
*[[2011]] – The [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] exclusive online members club is discontinued.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 128|''Star Wars Insider'' 128]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[The Force Awakens: Finn's Story]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 36|''Star Wars'' (2015) 36]] published.
*2017 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 12|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 12]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Gadgets and Gear]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 4: Crimson Reign]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Life Day Pop-Up Book and Advent Calendar]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The Galaxy's Greatest Villains]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 213|''Star Wars Insider'' 213]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 38|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 38]] published.
*2023 – [[Obi-Wan Kenobi 1|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2024 – "[[Mine and Ours / The Andraven Circuit]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
<noinclude>
